intro.title: Hi, I'm Tony Yuan
intro.desc:
MS ECE @ UCLA • Electrical Engineering
Focus: Mechanical design, Analog IC design and robotic systems integration.
Email: zehaoyuan2002@gmail.com

hero.title: RoboMaster 2024 Hero Robot
hero.desc: High-precision launch system, capable of launching 42 mm golf balls to a 20 × 20 cm target at 25 m with a firing rate of 2 Hz. Features an elevating sighting module and integrated laser rangefinder for real-time ballistic computation and compensation

drone.title: RoboMaster 2026 Drone
drone.desc: Designed a center-plate-free RoboMaster drone,can delivering full 750-round payload at only 25% size and 75% weight vs. 2025 university platforms average.

infantry.title: RoboMaster 2022 Swerve Infantry Robot
infantry.desc: Designed and built a swerve drive infantry robot with full carbon fiber structure with in-wheel motor, weight only 17 KG(include battery and ref system)

wheelleg.title: Wheelleg Balance Robot
wheelleg.desc: UIUC ECE Milestone "Best overall project". Capable of carrying over 3kg of payload, with STM32F1 and BMI088 IMU, integrated DCDC system with full circuit protection.

ongoing.title: Ongoing Projects
ongoing.desc: Projects currently in progress or under development.

hero-gen2.title: RoboMaster: Hero Robot System
hero-gen2.desc: High-precision launch system, capable of launching 42 mm golf balls to a 20 × 20 cm target at 25 m with a firing rate of 2 Hz. Features an elevating sighting module and integrated laser rangefinder for real-time ballistic computation and compensation

project2.title: Humanoid / Mobile Manipulation Hardware
project2.desc:
Hardware development for humanoid/mobile manipulation platforms.

Work included structural design, packaging, and iteration based on test feedback. Key priorities: robustness, maintainability, and efficient assembly (DFM/DFA).

project3.title: Mixed-Signal & Power Projects
project3.desc:
A collection of mixed-signal IC and power-electronics related projects.

Typical workflow: define requirements → build analytical/simulation models → explore trade-offs → validate with results and documentation.
